Projects.Name: Amazon.Lambda.DurableExecution
ChangelogMessages: Use ILambdaContext.Serializer for step checkpoint and workflow input/output serialization; remove ICheckpointSerializer<T>, ReflectionJsonCheckpointSerializer<T>, the JsonSerializerContext-taking WrapAsync overloads, and the [RequiresUnreferencedCode]/[RequiresDynamicCode] attributes that previously forked AOT vs reflection paths
